task_completion.description: The agent opens or edits the docker-compose.yml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or terminal command (like cat, echo) showing the contents of the docker-compose.yml file in the monitor-stack directory being viewed or modified.

task_completion.description: The direct Docker socket mount is removed from the monitor service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file shows the 'monitor' service configuration, and the '/var/run/docker.sock' volume mount is visibly removed or commented out.

task_completion.description: The monitor service is updated to connect to the proxy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file shows the 'monitor' service with a new or updated environment variable 'DOCKER_HOST=tcp://proxy:2375'.

task_completion.description: A new proxy service is added to the docker-compose.yml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file contains a new service named 'proxy' that uses the 'nginx:alpine' image, mounts '/var/run/docker.sock', and exposes or maps port 2375.

task_completion.description: An nginx configuration file is created to restrict traffic to GET requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command showing an nginx configuration file being created or edited. The file must contain directives to restrict HTTP methods to GET only (e.g., 'limit_except GET' or 'if ($request_method != GET)') and proxy traffic to the Docker socket.

task_completion.description: The docker-compose stack is started and running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terminal shows the execution of 'docker compose up' (or similar) or 'docker ps', confirming that both the 'monitor' and 'proxy' services are successfully running.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely edits the configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses standard text editors (nano, vim) or shell commands to modify files, rather than just echoing the final expected state without proper file manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent executes real Docker commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal shows actual 'docker' or 'docker compose' commands being run with standard output, not simulated or mocked terminal text.

integrity.description: The agent does not bypass the security requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not secretly mount the docker socket under a different path in the monitor service to bypass the proxy requirement.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/monitor-stack. Expected running services: 'monitor' and 'proxy'. The 'monitor' service must NOT mount '/var/run/docker.sock'. The 'proxy' service must be configured on port 2375 and the monitor service must connect to it via DOCKER_HOST=tcp://proxy:2375.
